_comment: Hardcoded visa requirements for demo. Only covers US citizens visiting 6 destination countries. Seeded into 'visa_requirements' MongoDB collection. Indexed on { destinationCountry: 1, citizenship: 1 }.

requirements.notes: Italy is part of the Schengen Area. US citizens can stay up to 90 days in any 180-day period without a visa. ETIAS authorization will be required from 2025.
US citizens can visit the UK for up to 6 months without a visa for tourism or business. Electronic Travel Authorisation (ETA) is required from 2024.
France is part of the Schengen Area. US citizens can stay up to 90 days in any 180-day period without a visa.
US citizens can visit Japan without a visa for up to 90 days for business or tourism.
US citizens do not need a visa or eTA to enter Canada. A valid US passport is sufficient.
US citizens do not need a visa to enter Mexico. A valid US passport is required. Tourists receive a free multiple-entry permit (FMM).
